'''vamafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coagency|coagency]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coagency|coagency]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vamafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væmæfæth|væmæfæth]] || [[word:væmæfæj|væmæfæj]] || [[word:væmæfæsh|væmæfæsh]] || [[word:væmæfæ|væmæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vamamafath|vamamafath]] || [[word:vamamafaj|vamamafaj]] || [[word:vamamafash|vamamafash]] || [[word:vamamafa|vamamafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vamafath|vamafath]] || [[word:vamafaj|vamafaj]] || [[word:vamafash|vamafash]] || [[word:vamafa|vamafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vamaffath|vamaffath]] || [[word:vamaffaj|vamaffaj]] || [[word:vamaffash|vamaffash]] || [[word:vamaffaf|vamaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vamafatha|vamafatha]] || [[word:vamafaja|vamafaja]] || [[word:vamafasha|vamafasha]] || [[word:vamafaka|vamafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vamafath|vamafath]] || [[word:vamafaj|vamafaj]] || [[word:vamafash|vamafash]] || [[word:vamafa|vamafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vamafathal|vamafathal]] || [[word:vamafajal|vamafajal]] || [[word:vamafashal|vamafashal]] || [[word:vamafakal|vamafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vamafathatha|vamafathatha]] || [[word:vamafajaja|vamafajaja]] || [[word:vamafashasha|vamafashasha]] || [[word:vamafaka|vamafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vamafathan|vamafathan]] || [[word:vamafajan|vamafajan]] || [[word:vamafashan|vamafashan]] || [[word:vamafakan|vamafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vamafathaoro|vamafathaoro]] || [[word:vamafajaoro|vamafajaoro]] || [[word:vamafashaoro|vamafashaoro]] || [[word:vamafakaoro|vamafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
